attorneys.name: GORDON, MARY JANE ALICE
attorneys.address: 35 GROVE ST., SUITE 105, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, 415-621-3337

calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for (petitioner) Kenneth Brown.

Ms. Gordon reported that she e-filed everything on the 5th but had to re-do it on the 6th, that the order for Hollister was $275,000.00, that the $500.00 discrepancy was a miscalculation by the title company in the estates favor, that in regards to the .5 stock discrepancy they initially did not have certificates, they were given the amount of 364 by the company and when the stock was sold they obtained the correct number of shares as 364.5. The Court stated that there was no correction made to either the inventory & appraisal or the accounting. Ms. Gordon stated that they did not know of the corrections until 2 years later, that the same thing happened with the Franklin Fund which was they received verbal information from the company and then a different number when it was cashed out, that in regards to the calculation of fees they have tried to show the calculation down to the last penny, they have gone over it many times and it always adds up the same, that they are not sure what the examiner wants, that they will accept what the court feels the amount should be, that in regards to the money order fees the administrator had been paying everything out of pocket and would sometimes use money orders to do so and that the fax machine was purchased to be able to take care of the business. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts Re 697 Le Conte
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Jan-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Status on filing of receipts for the blocked accounts was continued to January 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to review what has been filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts Re 1173 Hollister Ave.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for Kenneth Brown.

Ms. Gordon stated that they ran into an issue with the building inspector, that she received an e-mail this morning indicating that everything was clear and that they expect to close escrow by the end of the week. Ms. Gordon also stated that there were last minute expenses relating to the abatement, that the buyer paid $7,000.00 to clear it up, that they will need to hold some funds from the sale and suggested having two checks issued (one to the blocked account and one to the operating account). Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was continued to December 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1173 Hollister Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for Petitioner.

The Court clarified that each property is being sold separately. The sale was confirmed at $275,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 25, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property located at 1173 Hollister Ave., S.F. (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond. Status on filing of receipts for the blocked accounts was set for November 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (967 Le Conte S.F.)
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for Petitioner

The Court clarified that each property is being sold separately and that the commission should be 5% of $600,000.00 which equals $30,000.00. The sale was confirmed at $600,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 25, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property located at 967 Le Conte, S.F. (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was set for December 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
